property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Users\sergi\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\sergi\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\sergi\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\sergi\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;.

testcase.name: adicionarComponenteEmProdutoInexistenteRetorna404
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: http://165.227.93.41/lojinha/v2/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "usuarioLogin": "admin", "usuarioSenha": "admin", "usuarioNome": "Administrador" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Tue, 24 Mar 2026 21:21:41 GMT Server: Apache/2.4.29 (Ubuntu) Content-Length: 240 Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Connection: Keep-Alive Content-Type: application/json
{ "data": { "token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c3VhcmlvaWQiOiIxMjY1IiwidXN1YXJpb2xvZ2luIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJ1c3Vhcmlvbm9tZSI6ImFkbWluIn0.1yk-F1vPuzTsXzx1HVOK8SfHRaGfNw9PQUFmA6uUaGY" }, "message": "Sucesso ao realizar o login", "error": "" } Request method: POST Request URI: http://165.227.93.41/lojinha/v2/produtos Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c3VhcmlvaWQiOiIxMjY1IiwidXN1YXJpb2xvZ2luIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJ1c3Vhcmlvbm9tZSI6ImFkbWluIn0.1yk-F1vPuzTsXzx1HVOK8SfHRaGfNw9PQUFmA6uUaGY Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "produtoNome": "Produto Teste Automacao", "produtoValor": 100.99, "produtoCores": [ "Preto", "Branco" ], "produtoUrlMock": "", "componente": [ { "componenteNome": "Controle", "componenteQuantidade": 2 }, { "componenteNome": "Cabo De Energia", "componenteQuantidade": 1 } ] } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Tue, 24 Mar 2026 21:21:42 GMT Server: Apache/2.4.29 (Ubuntu) Content-Length: 217 Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Connection: Keep-Alive Content-Type: application/json
